signals.headline: US House Rejects War Powers Resolution on Iran | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US House Rejects War Powers Resolution on Iran | NO | HIGH confidence**

The U.S. House of Representatives rejected a war powers resolution seeking to limit President Trump's authority to wage war on Iran, voting 213-214 on Thursday[3]. Every House Republican voted against it except Kentucky's Thomas Massie, with Democrat Jared Golden of Maine crossing the aisle to vote with Republicans[3].
matched_markets: Will Trump say "The War Is Over" this week? (April 20 - 26)

signals.headline: Trump Signals Ceasefire Deadline Pressure | NO EXTENSION YET | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Signals Ceasefire Deadline Pressure | NO EXTENSION YET | HIGH confidence**

President Trump is signaling he may not extend the Iran ceasefire deadline if a deal isn't reached by Wednesday, warning of renewed military action[4]. The White House rejected reports of formally requesting a ceasefire extension, though negotiations remain ongoing[2].

signals.headline: Israel-Lebanon 10-Day Ceasefire Agreed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Israel-Lebanon 10-Day Ceasefire Agreed | YES | HIGH confidence**

Israel agreed to a 10-day ceasefire in Lebanon following U.S.-brokered talks, ending seven weeks of conflict that killed nearly 2,200 people[3]. However, Israel continued airstrikes through the ceasefire's implementation on Thursday evening[3].

signals.headline: US-Iran Nuclear Deal Nears Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Nuclear Deal Nears Completion | YES | HIGH confidence**

Reports indicate the U.S. is nearing a **$20 billion deal for Iran to surrender its uranium stockpile**, with further talks expected this weekend.[4] This geopolitical de-escalation triggered a broad crypto rally, with Bitcoin reaching $76,370 and Ethereum attracting buyers near $2,400.[4] This resolution is bullish for short-term Et

signals.headline: Ethereum 14% Weekly Rally Amid Geopolitical Optimism | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum 14% Weekly Rally Amid Geopolitical Optimism | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum's price surged 14% over the past week, pushing prediction market odds of ETH reaching $4,000 by month-end to **56% YES on Polymarket**.[2] Traders are betting on continued upward movement tied to potential ceasefire talks and de-escalation signals.[2]
